records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 have a CV type described as excellent and are linked to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types document_types ON documents.Document_Type_Code = document_types.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses expenses ON documents.Document_ID = expenses.Document_ID
JOIN Ref_Budget_Codes budget_codes ON expenses.Budget_Type_Code = budget_codes.Budget_Type_Code
JOIN Statements statements ON documents.Document_ID = statements.Statement_ID
JOIN Accounts accounts ON statements.Statement_ID = accounts.Statement_ID
WHERE documents.Document_Name = 'Review on French files'
  AND documents.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  AND document_types.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent'
  AND statements.statement_details LIKE '%Open Project%'

records.question: Which documents dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are classified as excellent, come from government expenses, relate to the Population Research project, and are linked to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Open Project' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types document_types ON documents.Document_Type_Code = document_types.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses expenses ON documents.Document_ID = expenses.Document_ID
JOIN Ref_Budget_Codes budget_codes ON expenses.Budget_Type_Code = budget_codes.Budget_Type_Code
JOIN Statements statements ON documents.Document_ID = statements.Statement_ID
JOIN Accounts accounts ON statements.Statement_ID = accounts.Statement_ID
JOIN Projects projects ON documents.Project_ID = projects.Project_ID
WHERE documents.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  AND document_types.Document_Type_Name = 'excellent'
  AND budget_codes.Budget_Type_Description = 'government expenses'
  AND projects.Project_Details LIKE '%Population Research%'
  AND accounts.Account_Details LIKE '%Open Project%'
